impact: This gives the supervisor deterministic recovery guidance when llm_router is repeatedly killed before producing a patch: stop retrying the same blocked domain task, switch to a narrow daemon-repair or task-planning cycle, and keep syntax recovery to small parser-clean file sets. It should reduce repeated no-op daemon rounds without touching PP&D domain automation or private artifacts.
summary: Tighten the PP&D supervisor repair guide for repeated LLM termination and parser-preflight loops.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 53 consecutive daemon rounds failed without an accepted patch

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
